tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_subagent_uses_active_registry runs actual vitest tests that import and call resolvePluginTools, mock dependencies, and verify behavioral outcomes (tools returned, mock not called). While test_active_registry_import and test_resolve_tools_delegates_registry are text-based structural checks, the primary behavioral test genuinely executes code.

test_not_tautological.reason: The vitest behavioral test mocks resolveRuntimePluginRegistry to return undefined, sets an active registry, and asserts tools are returned from it. A stub that returns an empty array would fail the expect(tools.map(t => t.name)).toEqual(['optional_tool']) assertion. The structural tests also cannot be passed by stubs since they check specific code patterns.
